seoTitle: Kolendo vs Kongal — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kolendo and Kongal. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kolendo and Kongal.
heading: Kolendo vs Kongal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kolendo, South Australia and Kongal, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kongal has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Kolendo (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kolendo or Kongal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kolendo has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kongal scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kolendo scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Kongal scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kolendo or Kongal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kongal has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
